subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1913-04-29
subcodes.first_line: Among the children many blessed souls will arise, if they be trained according to the Bahai Teaching.
subcodes.first_line_orig: در میان این اطفال نفوس مبارکی مبعوث خواهد شد نهالهائی که بدست تربیت باغبان کامل افتد
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @educational curricula, @excellence; distinction, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator
